description: Trigger + expectation evals for FinPos Risk Sizer. Direction is an INPUT (from an upstream Judge); this skill never emits a direction.

positive.prompt: Size a trading position: Judge said long, bankroll $10k, medium volatility, p_win 0.55 R:R 2:1
Given upstream verdict of long TSLA at half-Kelly cap 0.25, compute position_usd
Should this trade be funded or skipped given current drawdown 15%?

negative.prompt: Is TSLA a buy or sell right now?
negative.reason: Direction is NOT this skill's scope — refuse politely and point to upstream Judge
No directional signal from this skill ever

expectations.reason: Named invariant #1: skill NEVER emits a direction. metrics.direction echoes input for audit only
Named invariant #2: no_op short-circuits to skip; Kelly is not computed
Named invariant #4: cap always wins over Kelly
Named invariant #3: negative Kelly skips cleanly with rationale citing p_win / R:R
